candidate_phases.completion_note: Client workflow scope registered with allowed workflow, prohibited uses, required human review, no-free-pilot guardrails, and CPA/legal support threshold.
candidate_phases.goal: Define allowed client workflow, prohibited uses, required human review, and no-free-pilot guardrails.

candidate_phases.completion_note: Client intake checklist, required artifacts, artifact classification rules, and data-room index schema initialized.
candidate_phases.goal: Create client intake checklist, required artifacts, protected/private/public classifications, and data-room index.

candidate_phases.completion_note: Client seed artifacts routed through data-room index, provenance references, Claim Gauntlet status, and promotion-gate scaffolding.
candidate_phases.goal: Route client artifacts through provenance vault, claim gauntlet, and promotion gate.
Create bounded review packets and candidate-discrepancy memos from approved client artifacts.
Create delivery package structure with executive summary, methods boundary, findings tier, limitations, and next-step options.
Audit delivery boundaries, retention rules, human review, and client-safe language before handoff.

claim_boundary: This workplan registers a client intake and delivery scaffold only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding contract terms, compliance certification, production monitoring, or truth validation.
core_goal: Make client-facing workflow safer, repeatable, and bounded from first contact through intake, review, delivery, and closeout.
professional_threshold: If procurement, paid pilot, contract terms, budget, or money movement becomes real, engage CPA/legal support before proceeding alone.
purpose: Create a buyer/client-safe intake and delivery system for SpecShift engagements, including scoping, artifact intake, provenance, review packets, delivery notes, claim boundaries, and handoff checklists.
